content: Phase 1: Build POC test script (coin burn + draw entry + winner selection + jackpot math)
Phase 1: Run POC and fix until all core flows pass
Phase 2: Get design guidelines from design_agent
Phase 2: Build backend (FastAPI + MongoDB + APScheduler + Stripe webhook)
Phase 2: Build frontend (premium dark luxury UI per spec)
Phase 2: Seed T1 Daily Flash and T2 Weekly Stakes draws
Phase 2: Wire animated live jackpot counter (30s poll)
Phase 2: All user stories covered in development
Phase 3: Add JWT auth + Google OAuth scaffolding + referrals + streaks + winner flow
